blockedItems.detail: Publish explicit integration map linking CDE ↔ AE ↔ SkyDexia ↔ route flow.
Publish capability dependency map for autonomous platform shipping.
Publish operational ownership map (what runs where, who can rollback, who can approve).
Publish proof map tying each capability to smoke suites and evidence artifacts.
Replace AE stubs with production logic, then rerun full AE smoke.
Build SkyDexia knowledge-base skeleton with GiftsFromtheSkyes import path.
Implement admin email + rollback primitives for knowledge updates.
Start provider-script-backed E2E proof harness for generated platforms.
